name: Morning Hut
description: Morning Hut makes handmade, hand-painted Khurja ceramics — shaped, glazed and painted by artisans in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh, the ceramic heartland of India. Every piece is one of a kind.

hero.headline: A little village morning, made by hand.
hero.subhead: Hand-painted Khurja ceramics — shaped, glazed and painted by artisans in the ceramic heartland of India. No two pieces are ever exactly alike.

seo.defaultTitle: Morning Hut — Handmade, hand-painted Khurja ceramics
seo.description: Handmade, hand-painted Khurja ceramics. Each piece is shaped and painted by hand by artisans in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh — no two are ever alike.
